text:
funky festive Christmas gift filled with Smirnoff vodka selection chocolate sweet treats.
Smirnoff vodka gift would make perfect gift find stocking Christmas morning.
Cola Bottles: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Gelatine, Dextrose, Acid: Citric Acid; Caramelised Sugar Syrup, Flavouring, Glazing Agents: Beeswax, Carnauba Wax.
White Chocolate Holly Caramel: White Chocolate (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Whole Milk Powder, Emulsifier: Soya Lecithin; Natural Vanilla), Caramel (Sweetened Condensed Milk, Partially Inverted Sugar Syrup, Vegetable Oil, Sugar, Butter (Milk), Emulsifier: E471; Stabiliser: Pectin; Added Water, Salt, Flavourings), Glucose Syrup, Salt, Colours: E100, E153, E160a, E162.
Cocoa Solids: Minimum; Milk Solids: 22.8% Minimum.
Dark Chocolate Ganache: Cocoa Mass, Sugar, Water, Cocoa Butter, Anhydrous Milk Fat, Alcohol, Humectant (Sorbitol Syrup), (54% Vol.
Emulsifier: Soya Lecithin; Flavourings, Coffee, Père Jacobert (60% Vol.
Nuts.
